name: nexus-datasets
description: Reads records from a configured Infor Nexus export dataset through the Infor Nexus Data API (v3.1) using HMAC-SHA256 request signing. Read-only.

risk.read: external Infor Nexus dataset export read, HMAC-signed
risk.approval: none; read-only, no reverse-ETL write surface

conformance.reason: custom-auth-only (mode:custom AuthHook, no when-gated non-custom fallback); the HMAC-SHA256 signature is computed over the live request method/path/timestamp and conformance's synthetic non-secret config can never populate a real secret_key/api_key, so every auth-resolving dynamic check would fail identically and uninformatively -- hook-covered, proven live by internal/connectors/hooks/nexus-datasets's own unit tests (the AuthHook's real HMAC signing path) and internal/connectors/nexus-datasets_test.go's pre-existing legacy parity coverage
